facebook.caption: POV: you walked Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, spotted Bếp Biển, and took a chance. 4.8 stars across 1,300 reviews later, you get it. Fresh seafood, Phu Quoc style, no resort markup. This is the kind of place locals actually return to. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates landing. Shells cracking. 1,300 people gave Bếp Biển 4.8 stars and the food on screen tells you exactly why. No filter needed.

instagram.caption: Walked in not knowing. Left a 5-star convert. Bếp Biển hits 4.8 across 1,300 reviews for a reason. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh catch. 4.8 stars. Bếp Biển on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo earns every review in the first bite.

tiktok.caption: Took a chance on Bếp Biển. 4.8 stars, 1,300 reviews. Should've come sooner. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel #SeafoodTok
